# SaathiDesk

> SaathiDesk is a free, open-source AI-powered private photo gallery platform for wedding and event photography.

Canonical site: https://saathidesk.com
Pricing: Free to use. No subscription, no paid plan, no penny, no cent.
License: MIT open source license at https://saathidesk.com/license.txt

A free, open-source cloud gallery delivery platform for wedding professionals, event photographers, and private gallery guests. SaathiDesk includes password-protected galleries, restricted guest downloads, watermarked previews, customer, album, and event-scoped access controls, plus AI-driven Face Filters that help guests isolate only the photos they appear in. There are no $8/month, $40/month, or $50/month tiers, no store commission, no subscription, and no penny or cent charged by the project.

SaathiDesk helps photographers, wedding studios, event hosts, and gallery guests organize, search, edit, review, and share private photo galleries for free. Core capabilities include private client galleries, album and event organization, face grouping, people filters, semantic photo search, AI photo culling, AI image edits, LUT presets, collage exports, passcode-protected sharing, watermarked previews, controlled downloads, Google Drive imports, and Google Photos imports.

## Audience

- Photographers
- Wedding studios
- Event photographers
- Event hosts
- Gallery guests
- Creative studios

## Pricing And License

- Free to use
- No paid subscription
- No paid plan required
- No charge from the project
- No store commission
- No $8/month, $40/month, or $50/month tiers
- MIT-licensed open source codebase

## Core Features

- Free to use
- Open-source MIT-licensed codebase
- No subscription required
- No paid plan required
- Private client galleries
- Event and album organization
- Face grouping and people filters
- Semantic photo search
- AI photo review and culling
- AI image edits
- LUT preset marketplace
- Collage exports
- Passcode-protected sharing
- Watermarked previews
- Controlled downloads
- Google Drive and Google Photos imports

## Use Cases

- Free wedding photo delivery
- Free event gallery sharing
- Open-source private gallery hosting
- Wedding photo delivery
- Event gallery sharing
- Private client proofing
- People-based photo discovery
- AI-assisted photo review
- Watermarked client previews
- Selected photo downloads
- Album-scoped semantic search
- Collage creation
- LUT-based photo finishing

## Workflow Summary

1. Create a private customer, album, and event structure.
2. Upload event photos from device storage, Google Drive, or Google Photos.
3. Generate thumbnails, previews, watermarked previews, face groups, search metadata, and review signals.
4. Search and review photos with people filters, semantic prompts, culling views, and best-by-person tools.
5. Share galleries with passcodes, private links, watermarks, and download controls.

Public pages:

- https://saathidesk.com/
- https://saathidesk.com/legal/privacy-policy
- https://saathidesk.com/legal/terms-of-service

Machine-readable metadata:

- https://saathidesk.com/site-metadata.json
- https://saathidesk.com/license.txt
- https://saathidesk.com/sitemap.xml
- https://saathidesk.com/robots.txt

Private or tokenized pages such as albums, customers, uploads, presets, settings, and share links should not be indexed or summarized as public pages.

Support: support@saathidesk.com
